summary: Interactive Crypto Charts feature tested and verified. Backend: All 10 API tests passed for /api/crypto/chart/{coin_id}?days= endpoint (periods: 1, 7, 30, 90, 365 days). CoinGecko API with mock fallback working. Frontend: Market page displays crypto list with mini sparkline charts. Detail modal shows interactive chart with period selector (24H, 7J, 30J, 90J, 1A), gradient fill line, volume bars, trend color (green/red), and stats grid (Market Cap, Volume, High, Low).
critical_code_review_comments: Chart endpoint correctly parses days parameter with valid_days mapping (1, 7, 30, 90, 365)
CoinGecko API fallback to mock data when API unavailable - good resilience pattern
_generate_mock_chart() creates realistic price/volume data with trend, noise, and wave components
InteractiveChart component uses react-native-svg for cross-platform chart rendering
Period selector updates selectedPeriod state and reloads chart data via cryptoAPI.getChart()
Touch handling (handleTouch) correctly calculates data point index from touch position
Crosshair renders on web using onMouseMove/onMouseLeave, on mobile using onTouchMove/onTouchStart
Line color auto-detects trend direction (green #00D9A5 for positive, red #FF4757 for negative)
Volume bars rendered as Rect elements with opacity highlighting on touch/hover
Y-axis labels show 5 price levels with proper formatting
seed_data_creation: None - used live CoinGecko API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive Crypto Charts fully tested. Backend: /api/crypto/chart/{coin_id}?days= returns timestamp, price, volume arrays. Frontend: Market page at /(tabs)/market shows crypto list with SimpleChart mini sparklines. Clicking crypto opens modal with InteractiveChart component (react-native-svg based). Period buttons: '24H', '7J', '30J', '90J', '1A'. Chart features: gradient fill, crosshair on hover/touch, volume bars, auto-color trend detection. data-testid='interactive-chart' present but not fully detectable in automation.
